name: flight-tracker-backend
description: Backend API for Flight Tracker - Deal monitoring and notification system

scripts.clear-deals: node -e "const mongoose = require('mongoose'); require('dotenv').config(); mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGODB_URI).then(async () => { await mongoose.connection.db.collection('flights').deleteMany({}); await mongoose.connection.db.collection('deals').deleteMany({}); console.log('✅ All deals cleared'); process.exit(0); });"
